messages.content:
Hello! I'm **MAX**, your Empire AI Assistant.

_Tip: Ctrl+V to paste images · Shift+Enter for newlines_
Help me create a new quote for a client in WorkroomForge. whittington design

## Image Analysis — Whittington Design Project

What a stunning room! Let me break down what I see before opening the QuoteBuilder.

---

### 🖼️ Room Analysis

**Space:** Music/Piano Room — elegant, high-end residential
**Style:** Classic/Traditional with luxury finishes

**Window Treatments Visible:**
- **3 window groupings** (bay-style arrangement with center + flanking windows)
- **Pinch Pleat drapery panels** — floor-to-ceiling, full length
- **Fabric:** Silver/blue-grey sheer-weight fabric with subtle shimmer/sparkle detail
- **Color:** Soft silver-grey, coordinates beautifully with the botanical wallpaper
- **Mounting:** Decorative rods with finials (gold/brass tone matching chandelier)
- **Stack:** Generous fabric stack, likely 2.5-3x fullness

**Estimated Windows:**
| Location | Type | Est. Width | Est. Height |
|----------|------|-----------|-------------|
| Left window | Single + drapery panels | ~36" | ~108" |
| Center bay (3 windows) | Bay grouping + center panel | ~120" total | ~108" |
| Right window | Single + drapery panels | ~36" | ~108" |

**Total est. fabric:** High yardage — this is a premium job

---
